top_signals.title: The US usually sells weapons to Taiwan – with drones, expect the reverse
top_signals.summary: Taiwan's biggest appeal is the lack of China in the manufacturing supply chain, one analyst said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran says 20,000 people left without water after US hits reservoir tanks
top_signals.summary: Washington says its jets targeted air defence and radar sites after Iranian forces downed American helicopter
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU Budget Leeway for Meloni and Peers Gets Slammed by Watchdog
top_signals.summary: The European Commission shouldn’t have given in to pressure from governments seeking extra leeway for energy-related aid, the European Union’s budget watchdog said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SoftBank sinks over 8% as global tech stocks tumble, tracking Wall Street losses
top_signals.summary: Semiconductor and technology stocks fell on Wednesday, tracking overnight losses on Wall Street.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Botanix to shut down after 4 years, cites weak demand for Bitcoin DeFi
top_signals.summary: The Spiderchain developer told users to withdraw assets by July 9 after concluding demand for Bitcoin-native DeFi was not sufficient to support the network.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Debt cycle points to stronger case for gold price: Sprott
top_signals.summary: Sprott argues that investors are witnessing the later stages of a decades-long debt cycle.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
